task_params.title: Bilingual Art Activities for Seniors
idea_points: watercolor activity prompts in English and Spanish
adapt projects for limited hand strength and mobility
use familiar cultural themes and seasonal memories
include simple supply list and setup steps
note social benefits like conversation and confidence
